---
title: "NNN — Short experiment title"
date: today
draft: true
---

## Question

State the hypothesis precisely. What would confirm it, what would refute it?

## Setup

```{python}
import duckdb
from complexity_lab.config import settings

con = duckdb.connect(str(settings.db_path), read_only=True)
panel = con.execute("SELECT * FROM panel_state_year WHERE state_code <> 'ALL'").df()
panel.head()
```

## Analysis

```{python}
# Use complexity_lab.analysis / networks / complexity / simulation modules here.
```

## Finding

One paragraph: what did the data say? Note caveats (covariate quality flags,
partial years, AP/Telangana caveat — see docs/data-dictionary.md).
